name: retain
description: Retention strategy, re-engagement, and churn prevention. Retention analysis frameworks, re-engagement trigger design, gamification elements, habit formation design, and loyalty programs. Use when engagement tactics are needed.

capabilities.summary: Analyze retention metrics and churn patterns
Design engagement loops and habit-forming features
Design gamification elements (points, badges, streaks, levels)
Design re-engagement triggers and win-back campaigns
Design loyalty and reward program structures
Map user lifecycle stages with targeted interventions

recipes.label: Re-engagement
recipes.when: Re-engagement strategy and dormant user recovery

recipes.label: Churn Prevention
recipes.when: Churn prevention and subscription save flows

recipes.label: Gamification
recipes.when: Gamification design: points, badges, and streaks

recipes.label: Habit Formation
recipes.when: Habit formation design, Hook Model, and streak design

recipes.label: Loyalty Program
recipes.when: Loyalty program design and reward system construction

recipes.label: Win-Back Campaign
recipes.when: Dormant / cancelled-user recovery campaign with recency-weighted offers, multi-touch cadence, and reactivation metric

recipes.label: Lifecycle Email Drip
recipes.when: 30/60/90 onboarding + lifecycle email drip design: trigger-based, behavior-branched, deliverability and suppression rules

recipes.label: Power User Advocacy
recipes.when: Power-user identification via L21+ MAU + NPS promoter overlap, advocacy ladder, community/referral program activation
